In the Prasar Bharati (Broadcasting Corporation o f India) Salaries, Allowances and other Conditions of Service of Chairman, Whole-time Members and Part-time Members Rules, 2000, in rule (3),— (a) In sub-rule (1), for the words and brackets “ rupees twenty-six thousand per month (fixed)” , the words and brackets “ rupees eighty thousand per month (fixed)” shall be substituted. (b) In sub-rule (2), for the words, letters and figures “ in the scale o f Rs. 22,400-525-24,500” , the words, letters, figures and brackets “ in the scale o f Rs. 67,000— (annual increment at the rate of three per cent)— 79,000” shall be substituted. [E No, 4501 l/48/2008-BA(P)] R. K. SINGH, Jt. Secy. N o te :— The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part 11, Section 3, Sub-section (i), vide number G.S.R. 863(E), dated the lOthNovember, 2000 and was subsequently amended by number G.S.R. 126(E), dated 1st March, 2006, number G.S.R. 464(E), dated the 20th June, 2012 and number G.S.R. 884(r,), dated the 7th December, 2012.
